# Pressurized Cement Balance

**Summary**: A tool used to measure the density of cement slurries, especially in high-pressure environments.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-thalab|Thalab, 2015]] used pressurized-cement-balance to determine the density of various cement mixtures.

- The 1% SB mixture resulted in a density of 16.52 lb/gal. ([[2015-thalab|Thalab, 2015, p. 96]])
